description_long: This is a large, industrial-grade printer or manufacturing machine, featuring a robust rectangular body with a combination of black, white, and gray panels. The machine is equipped with a prominent red robotic arm, which appears to be used for automated handling or manipulation of materials, and is mounted on a sturdy black base. On one side, there is a control console with a touchscreen interface and several buttons, suggesting advanced programmable functions. The main body has multiple access doors and ventilation grilles, indicating internal compartments for mechanical or electronic components. The front face displays a clear brand marking 'CK40' and a detailed control panel with a display and numerous buttons. The overall design is highly industrial, with smooth, hard surfaces and a modular, functional layout.
description: A large, industrial printer with a black and white body, red robotic arm, and a control console. It features multiple access panels, a touchscreen interface, and prominent branding.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rectangular body, control console on the right, and the robotic arm partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the control console, the full robotic arm, and the back of the main unit.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main access door, control panel, 'CK40' branding, and the robotic arm in front of the machine.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the length of the machine, the robotic arm, and a small stand-alone post nearby.
attribute_brand_logo: A visible brand logo is present on the front face, left side, with the text 'CK40' in white and red, and a smaller logo/emblem above it. The logo is medium-sized and clearly legible.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located on the front right side, featuring a rectangular layout with a digital display, numerous physical buttons, and a rotary knob. An additional touchscreen console is positioned to the left of the main unit.
